verdict_reason: Tags on BG 2.21 are spec-vs-behavior, deprecation-management, essence-vs-implementation. All three are coherent with the verse's doctrinal payload. spec-vs-behavior is the load-bearing tag (the four properties map to spec-level invariants); deprecation-management is the practical implication (the realised one's stance toward predecessors' deprecated code); essence-vs-implementation captures the dehī-vs-śarīra structure that 2.22 will make canonical. The three tags together name distinct angles on the same verse without redundancy. No cross_references[] declared. Score 8 — coherent within visible scope. PASS.
